summary: CVE Ownership Model testing complete. All 17 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend ownership features verified including CVE Database tab with Assign/Reassign buttons, Assign Owner Modal with dropdowns and New option, Create CVE Modal with assigned_to/assigned_team fields, and Governance > Ownership tab with unassigned CVE alerts, owner/team lists, and charts.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/cve/owners correctly returns people, teams, and unassigned_open_cves count
GET /api/cve/unassigned correctly filters to only open CVEs (detected/triaged/in_progress) without owner
PUT /api/cve/entries/{id}/owner successfully assigns and persists owner/team with audit trail
POST /api/cve/entries/bulk-assign correctly handles partial failures and reports updated/failed counts
Create CVE endpoint accepts and persists assigned_to and assigned_team fields
New owners/teams automatically appear in /owners list after first assignment
AssignOwnerModal correctly shows dropdown for existing owners/teams with New button for custom entry
Governance > Ownership sub-view correctly displays unassigned CVE alerts with Assign buttons
Registered Owners and Teams sections display all distinct values from CVE and service data
CVE Sources pie chart and Status Distribution bar chart render correctly with Recharts
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test CVEs with various owners/teams for testing bulk assign, reassign, and clear functionality
context_for_next_testing_agent: CVE Ownership Model fully functional. 4 ownership endpoints working: GET /owners, GET /unassigned, PUT /entries/{id}/owner, POST /entries/bulk-assign. Frontend has AssignOwnerModal in CVE Database tab and Governance > Ownership sub-view with charts. All data-testid attributes present for testing.

backend_tests.GET /api/cve/unassigned returns structur: PASS - Returns items array and total count
backend_tests.Reassign owner: PASS - Owner changed from first to second
backend_tests.Clear assignment: PASS - Owner/team set to empty strings
backend_tests.GET /api/cve/governance/ownership: PASS - Returns by_team, by_person, by_source, by_status
backend_tests.Governance ownership team structure: PASS - Each entry has team and count
backend_tests.Governance ownership person structure: PASS - Each entry has person and count
backend_tests.Unassigned only includes open CVEs: PASS - All items have open status

frontend_tests.CVE Database tab loads: PASS - Shows CVE list with search/filters
frontend_tests.Expand CVE shows owner info: PASS - Shows Owner: Unassigned with Assign button
frontend_tests.Expand CVE shows Reassign for assigned: PASS - Shows Owner: [name] with Reassign button
frontend_tests.AssignOwnerModal dropdowns: PASS - Assignee and Team dropdowns with existing options
frontend_tests.AssignOwnerModal New button: PASS - Switches to text input for custom entry
frontend_tests.Create CVE Modal fields: PASS - Has 'Assign to (person)' and 'Assign to (team)' inputs
frontend_tests.Create CVE with owner: PASS - CVE created with assigned_to and assigned_team
frontend_tests.Unassigned CVEs alert: PASS - Shows '1 unassigned open CVE' with message
frontend_tests.Unassigned CVEs list: PASS - Shows CVE with severity badge and Assign button
frontend_tests.Open CVEs by Team chart: PASS - Bar chart with team names and counts
frontend_tests.Open CVEs by Assignee chart: PASS - Bar chart with person names and counts
frontend_tests.Registered Owners section: PASS - Shows tags for all owners
frontend_tests.Registered Teams section: PASS - Shows tags for all teams
frontend_tests.CVE Sources pie chart: PASS - Shows manual, yarn_audit, pip_audit, automated_test
frontend_tests.Status Distribution bar chart: PASS - Shows detected, verified, fixed, dismissed
